# Shopping Cart Boats
![Requires](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/dqf94vyckp50yw0ohxsu4/r.png?rlkey=1w29drk0cgo454dh301cafwj9&st=oujarwn7&raw=1)[![ETF](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/ws960ahfkhfqnrsqkcilv/et.png?rlkey=w8fujlhdtt9tn57trnqkgi039&st=8hm018ks&raw=1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)![Plus](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/sw5siw0xwrg7prx9mb192/p.png?rlkey=0pavr0l7p8vkwrdcyi56lqoir&raw=1)[![EMF](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/prngjz65opz5l54kfy39z/e.png?rlkey=harnv3pqnasrdl3a3bk47s205&st=umph0hff&raw=1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or [![OptiFine](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/thfwderk9tgm9yzq281jx/optifine.jpg?rlkey=l89bglqjt5ixh9lqj1unk547a&raw=1)](https://optifine.net/downloads)  
Shopping Cart Boats is a resource pack that replaces Minecraft boats with shopping carts pushed by mobs.

**Requires [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) + [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) to support custom models.**  

- acacia -> ```llama, horse, ravager, polarbear, panda```
- birch -> ```pig, cow, sheep, goat, chicken, turtle, cat, wolf, axolotl```
- cherry -> ```skeleton, wither_skeleton, stray```
- dark_oak -> ```enderman, warden, iron_golem, snow_golem```
- jungle -> ```villager```
-  mangrove -> ```witch, illusioner, evoker, pillager, vindicator, wandering_trader```
- oak -> ```alex, steve```
- pale_oak -> ```piglin, piglin_brute, zombified_piglin, hoglin, zoglin```
- spruce -> ```zombie, husk, drowned, zombie_villager```


Enjoy your shopping!

![Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9297b87ccbfe9f67c4a4d3a0efd66b2280f62ad.gif)
